resources.title: All NPTEL Resources
resources.description: Dedicated server of 20TB with all NPTEL videos and PDFs. Available only within LAN.

resources.description: Access IEEE digital library resources. No password required within college LAN.

resources.description: Internal learning management system for accessing institutional resources.

resources.description: GATE preparation platform. Contact departmental coordinator for access credentials.

resources.title: VIDEETA: Online e-Books
resources.description: Access online e-books. Contact librarian for login credentials.

resources.title: Spoken Tutorial Courses
resources.description: Initiative under National Mission on Education through ICT by MHRD to provide learning resources.
